body.title: Shim auto-starts bus server if not running
body.result: won't fix — superseded by T-bus-postgres-transport (Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY replaces IMAP entirely)
body.intention: I intend that any shim needing the bus can start the bus server itself when it finds none running, so devices come up cleanly without manual infrastructure setup.
body.description:
Currently shims call `make_bus_connection()` which wraps `_DovecotClient` in production (connects to Dovecot on port 143) or `_StubServer` in TEST_MODE. When neither is running the shim fails silently. The fix: add a shared in-process bus server that any shim can start or join.

Approach:
1. Extract a `BusServer` singleton (module-level in `bus/imap_server.py` or `bus/connection.py`) that starts a `_StubServer` on port 10143 if port 10143 isn't already bound.
2. `make_bus_connection()` checks port 10143 first: if something answers, connect to it; if not, start the singleton and connect.
3. The first shim to call `make_bus_connection()` starts the bus; subsequent shims join it. Clean separation: any shim can bootstrap the bus, but only one server runs.
4. `_StubServer` already handles concurrent clients via asyncio — no locking needed beyond the singleton start guard (threading.Lock or check-then-start under a lock).

This replaces the Dovecot dependency for in-rack dev/production use when a real IMAP server isn't deployed.

**Affected files:** bus/imap_server.py, bus/connection.py, devices/dicksimnel/shim.py (verification only — `_connect_bus` should just work after this)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no new external dependencies
**Scope boundary:** IN — shared stub bus singleton on 10143; `make_bus_connection()` auto-starts it. OUT — Dovecot deployment, IMAP auth, persistence across process restarts.
**Completion criteria:** Start DickSimnel with no bus running; `nc -z 127.0.0.1 10143` returns open within 3s; DickSimnel's listener stops logging 'Connection refused' and starts polling successfully; all existing bus tests pass.
